arts.ttl: SuperCoppa Italiana Final: Milan v Inter: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the highly anticipated Derby della Madonnina approaches, Inter Milan and AC Milan are set to clash in the Supercoppa Italiana on Monday. This match not only carries the weight of local rivalry but also the significance of silverware, with Inter aiming for their fourth consecutive title and Milan looking to equal their rivals with eight Supercoppa wins. arts.ttl: Milan’s Loftus-Cheek returns to group Training: Set to Feature Against Inter
arts.sum: In a positive development for AC Milan and new manager Sergio Conceicao, Ruben Loftus-Cheek has resumed group training following his injury layoff. The English midfielder joined his teammates who did not participate in the Supercoppa Italiana semi-final victory over Juventus. The post Milan’s Loftus-Cheek returns to group Training: Set to Feature Against Inter appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Vieri previews Inter-Milan Supercoppa Final: “The Rossoneri have a chance, Lautaro is not in crisis”
arts.sum: Former Italian striker Christian Vieri has shared his thoughts on the upcoming Supercoppa Italiana final between Inter Milan and AC Milan. Speaking from Riyadh, where he is attending the match, Vieri emphasized the importance and prestige of the trophy. arts.ttl: Conceicao: “Inter rested more and we have 4/5 players not at their best”
arts.sum: Sergio Conceição, the head coach of AC Milan, held a press conference to discuss the upcoming Supercoppa Italiana final against Inter Milan, scheduled for January 6, 2025. The conference was delayed due to Conceição feeling under the weather. The post Conceicao: “Inter rested more and we have 4/5 players not at their best” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Former Inter Ultras leader: “Marotta knew I had a stadium ban, I was always in contact with Inter”
arts.sum: Former Inter Milan ultras leader Andrea Beretta, currently imprisoned on murder charges, has made startling claims about his relationship with the club's management. In a recent interrogation by Milan prosecutor Paolo Storari, Beretta provided detailed information about Inter's fan groups and alleged regular communication with the club's leadership. arts.ttl: Inter Quest for Fourth Straight Supercoppa Title Hinges on Key Decision
arts.sum: Inter manager Simone Inzaghi has a huge void to fill in the upcoming Supercoppa Italiana final against bitter rivals Milan. Marcus Thuram picked up a muscle injury in a 2-0 semifinal win against Atalanta last Thursday.
